title: すみれステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Sumire Stakes has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a race that should pose no difficulties for
Super Creek... However, she isn't feeling well
right before the start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She manages to recover somewhat by taking a
nap and heads to the track with the intention of
winning.
